request_hint.last_user_message_contains: summarize the latest release from https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw

response.content:
## IronClaw v0.29.1 — Release Summary

**Tag:** `ironclaw-v0.29.1` | **Published:** 2026-06-04 | [Release page](https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw/releases/tag/ironclaw-v0.29.1)

---

### ✨ Added
- **Web:** Temperature is now plumbed through the Responses API. (#3641)

### 🐛 Fixed
- **Engine:** Scoped v1 history for channel conversations — fixes history isolation in channel-based chat. (#4320)

### 🔧 CI / Release
- Added a **WeCom** release artifact. (#4107)
- CI now tracks `nearai-benchmarks` at `main` instead of a pinned revision. (#4217)
- Granted `id-token: write` permission to unblock the `nearai-bench` reusable workflow. (#4220)
- Scoped `id-token: write` down to just the `nearai-bench` job. (#4221)

---

### Install

```sh
# Shell script (Linux/macOS)
curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -LsSf \
  https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw/releases/download/ironclaw-v0.29.1/ironclaw-installer.sh | sh

# npm
npm install ironclaw@0.29.1
```

A Windows MSI installer and tarballs for all major platforms (macOS Apple Silicon/Intel, Linux x64/ARM64 glibc/musl, Windows x64) are also available on the release page.
